### Tech Stack

##### Data Manipulation & Analysis

-   **R:** [{tidyverse}](https://www.tidyverse.org/), [{duckplyr}](https://duckplyr.tidyverse.org/index.html), [{data.table}](https://rdatatable.gitlab.io/data.table/)
-   **Python:** Polars, Ibis
-   **SQL:** PostreSQL, MS SQL Server, DuckDB
-   **Excel:** Power Query, Pivot Tables, Data Validation, XLOOKUP/INDEX-MATCH

##### Data Visualization & Reporting

-   **Static Visualizations:** [{ggplot2}](https://ggplot2.tidyverse.org/), [{gt}](https://gt.rstudio.com/)
-   **Interactive Visualizations:** [{plotly}](https://plotly.com/), [{reactable}](https://glin.github.io/reactable/index.html)
-   **Dynamic Documents & Presentations:** [Quarto](https://quarto.org/)

##### Dashboarding & Data Apps
-   **Enterprise Tools:** Tableau Desktop & Prep, Power BI
-   **Open-Source Frameworks:** [Shiny]((https://shiny.posit.co/)) (R)

##### Web Development, & Scraping

-   **Web Technologies:** HTML, SASS/SCSS/CSS
-   **HTTP Libraries:** [{httr2}](https://httr2.r-lib.org/)
-   **Web Scraping Tools:** [{rvest}](https://rvest.tidyverse.org/), Selenium/[{RSelenium}](https://docs.ropensci.org/RSelenium/index.html)

##### Modeling & MLOps

-   **Model Development:** [{tidymodels}](https://www.tidymodels.org/)
-   **Model Deployment:** [{vetiver}](https://rstudio.github.io/vetiver-r/), [{plumber}](https://www.rplumber.io/)

##### DevOps & Infrastructure

-   **Containers:** Docker
-   **Cloud Infrastructure:** AWS (EC2, S3, IAM)
-   **CI/CD:** GitHub Actions
-   **Logging:** {log4r}
